Desc_Stone_C.name: Calcário
Desc_Stone_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. A basic resource primarily used for stable Foundations.

Desc_OreIron_C.name: Minério de Ferro
Desc_OreIron_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. O recurso básico mais essencial.

Desc_OreCopper_C.name: Minério de Cobre
Desc_OreCopper_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. A basic resource primarily used for electricity.

Desc_OreGold_C.name: Minério de Catério
Desc_OreGold_C.description: Smelted into Caterium Ingots, which are primarily used for advanced electronics.

Desc_Coal_C.name: Carvão
Desc_Coal_C.description: Mainly used as fuel for vehicles & Coal-Powered Generators, or in Steel production.

Desc_RawQuartz_C.name: Quartzo Bruto
Desc_RawQuartz_C.description: Can be processed into Quartz Crystals and Silica, which both offer a variety of applications.

Desc_Sulfur_C.name: Enxofre
Desc_Sulfur_C.description: Primarily used to produce Black Powder.

Desc_OreBauxite_C.name: Bauxita
Desc_OreBauxite_C.description: Used to produce Alumina, which can be further refined into the Aluminum Scrap required to produce Aluminum Ingots.

Desc_SAM_C.name: EMA
Desc_SAM_C.description: Strange Alien Matter, commonly referred to as SAM, doesn't seem to follow the known laws of physics. It whispers of new possibilities.

Desc_OreUranium_C.name: Urânio
Desc_OreUranium_C.description: A radioactive element. Utilizado para produzir Células de Urânio Encapsuladas para Varas de Combustível de Urânio. Cuidado: Moderadamente Radioativa.

Desc_IronIngot_C.name: Barra de Ferro
Desc_IronIngot_C.description: Used for crafting the most basic parts.

schemas.name: Alternativa: Lingote de Liga de Ferro

Desc_CopperIngot_C.name: Barra de Cobre
Desc_CopperIngot_C.description: Used for crafting the most basic parts.

schemas.name: Alternativa: Lingote de Liga de Cobre

Desc_GoldIngot_C.name: Barra de Catério
Desc_GoldIngot_C.description: Smelted from Caterium Ore. Primarily used for advanced electronics.

Desc_SteelIngot_C.name: Lingote de Aço
Desc_SteelIngot_C.description: Smelted from a combination of Iron Ore and Coal. Can be made into several parts used in building construction.

schemas.name: Alternativa: Lingote de Aço de Coque

Desc_AluminumIngot_C.name: Lingote de Alumínio
Desc_AluminumIngot_C.description: Smelted from Aluminum Scrap, which is refined from Alumina Solution. Utilizadas para produzir peças especializadas à base de alumínio.

Desc_FicsiteIngot_C.name: Ficsite Ingot
Desc_FicsiteIngot_C.description: Produced by reconstructing other metals on a molecular level using Strange Alien Matter. Synthesized by FICSIT to be the perfect construction material, and used in the most high-end processes.

Desc_Cement_C.name: Betão
Desc_Cement_C.description: Usado para construir. Bom para fundações estáveis.

Desc_QuartzCrystal_C.name: Cristal de Quartzo
Desc_QuartzCrystal_C.description: Derivado do Quartzo Bruto. Utilizado na produção de tecnologia avançada de radar e ecrãs de alta qualidade.

Desc_Silica_C.name: Sílica
Desc_Silica_C.description: Derived from Raw Quartz. Commonly used to create glass structures, in advanced refinement processes, and for alternative production of electronics.

Desc_CopperDust_C.name: Pó de Cobre
Desc_CopperDust_C.description: Ground-up Copper Ingots. The high natural density of Copper, combined with the granularity of the powder, makes this part perfect for producing Nuclear Pasta in the Particle Accelerator.

Desc_PolymerResin_C.name: Resina de Polímero
Desc_PolymerResin_C.description: Um subproduto da refinação do Petróleo Bruto em Combustível. Usado comummente na manufatura de Plástico e Borracha.

Desc_PetroleumCoke_C.name: Coque de Petróleo
Desc_PetroleumCoke_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. Um material rico em carbono, destilado de Resíduos de Petróleo Pesado. Utilizado como substituto de carvão menos eficiente.

Desc_AluminumScrap_C.name: Sucata de Alumínio
Desc_AluminumScrap_C.description: Refined from Alumina. Can be smelted into Aluminum Ingots for industrial usage.

schemas.name: Alternativa: Elétrodo de Sucata de Alumínio

Desc_AlienDNACapsule_C.name: Cápsula de ADN Alienígena
Desc_AlienDNACapsule_C.description: Translates organic chemicals into readable alien genetic information. Usada para pesquisar organismos alienígenas. Go the extra kilometer! Knowledge is power, and power is just efficiency with fewer steps. Depositing Alien DNA Capsules in the AWESOME Sink provides FICSIT with knowledge, and pioneers with Coupons.

schemas.name: Alternativa: Elétrodo de Sucata de Alumínio

Desc_LiquidOil_C.name: Petróleo Bruto
Desc_LiquidOil_C.description: Refined into all kinds of Oil-based resources, like Fuel and Plastic.

Desc_HeavyOilResidue_C.name: Resíduo de Petróleo Pesado
Desc_HeavyOilResidue_C.description: Um subproduto da produção de Plástico e Borracha. Pode ser convertido em Combustível e Coque de Petróleo.

Desc_LiquidFuel_C.name: Combustivel
Desc_LiquidFuel_C.description: Can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

Desc_LiquidBiofuel_C.name: Biocombustível Líquido
Desc_LiquidBiofuel_C.description: Liquid Biofuel can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles.

Desc_LiquidTurboFuel_C.name: Turbo-combustível
Desc_LiquidTurboFuel_C.description: A more efficient alternative to Fuel. Can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles.

Desc_AluminaSolution_C.name: Solução de Alumina
Desc_AluminaSolution_C.description: Alumina dissolvida, extraída da Bauxite. Pode ser ainda mais refinada em Sucata de Alumínio para produção de Barras de Alumínio.

Desc_SulfuricAcid_C.name: Ácido Sulfúrico
Desc_SulfuricAcid_C.description: Produced by combining Sulfur and Water in a complex reaction. Primarily used in refinement processes and Battery production.

Desc_NitricAcid_C.name: Ácido Nítrico
Desc_NitricAcid_C.description: Produced when Nitrogen Gas reacts with Water. Its high corrosiveness and oxidizing properties make it an excellent choice for refinement and fuel production processes.

Desc_DissolvedSilica_C.name: Dissolved Silica
Desc_DissolvedSilica_C.description: Silica dissolved in Water, produced as part of the alternative refinement of Raw Quartz. The Silica can be extracted from the Water to complete the refinement process.

Desc_NitrogenGas_C.name: Gás Nitrogénio
Desc_NitrogenGas_C.description: Has a variety of uses, including metallurgy, cooling, and Nitric Acid production. On MASSAGE-2 (AB)b, it can be extracted from underground gas wells.

Desc_RocketFuel_C.name: Combustível de Foguete
Desc_RocketFuel_C.description: A high-impulse compressed gas fuel. Can be used as-is to power Fuel-Powered Generators, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

Desc_IonizedFuel_C.name: Ionized Fuel
Desc_IonizedFuel_C.description: Fuel that has been ionized, allowing it to deliver incredible output. Can be used as-is to power Fuel-Powered Generators, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

Desc_DarkEnergy_C.name: Dark Matter Residue
Desc_DarkEnergy_C.description: Produced as a by-product of Quantum Encoding processes and alternatively generated in the Converter. Various fields of science are still debating the nature and properties of Dark Matter. Meanwhile, FICSIT has found several applications for it in space-time manipulation.

Desc_IronRod_C.name: Vara de Ferro
Desc_IronRod_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. Uma das peças mais básicas.

Desc_IronScrew_C.name: Parafuso
Desc_IronScrew_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. Uma das peças mais básicas.

Desc_IronPlate_C.name: Chapa de Ferro
Desc_IronPlate_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. Uma das peças mais básicas.

Desc_IronPlateReinforced_C.name: Placa de Ferro Reforçada
Desc_IronPlateReinforced_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. Uma Placa de Ferro mais resistente e duradoura.

Desc_CopperSheet_C.name: Chapa de cobre
Desc_CopperSheet_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. Utilizado principalmente em tubos devido à sua alta resistência à corrosão.

Desc_AluminumPlate_C.name: Chapa de Alumínio Alclad
Desc_AluminumPlate_C.description: Used to make products that require high heat conduction or a high specific strength. Thin, lightweight, and highly durable.

Desc_AluminumCasing_C.name: Caixa de Alumínio
Desc_AluminumCasing_C.description: Um recipiente versátil fundido a partir de Barras de Alumínio.

Desc_SteelPipe_C.name: Tubo de Aço
Desc_SteelPipe_C.description: Primarily used when constructing slightly more advanced buildings.

Desc_SteelPlate_C.name: Viga de Aço
Desc_SteelPlate_C.description: Primarily used when constructing slightly more advanced buildings.

Desc_SteelPlateReinforced_C.name: Viga Industrial Revestida
Desc_SteelPlateReinforced_C.description: Simultaneously utilizes the compressive strength of concrete and the tensile strength of steel. Mostly used as a stable base for constructing buildings.

Desc_ModularFrame_C.name: Estrutura Modular
Desc_ModularFrame_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. A multipurpose building block.

Desc_ModularFrameFused_C.name: Estrutura Modular Fundida
Desc_ModularFrameFused_C.description: A corrosion-resistant, nitride-hardened, highly-robust-yet-lightweight modular frame.

Desc_FicsiteMesh_C.name: Ficsite Trigon
Desc_FicsiteMesh_C.description: The Ficsite Trigon, made from Ficsite Ingots, is perfectly shaped for all construction challenges. Its performance is so exceptional, it basically solved structural engineering.

Desc_Fabric_C.name: Tecido
Desc_Fabric_C.description: Used to craft equipment. Tecido flexível, mas duradouro.

Desc_Plastic_C.name: Plástico
Desc_Plastic_C.description: Versatile and easy to manufacture, this material has a wide range of uses.

Desc_Rubber_C.name: Borracha
Desc_Rubber_C.description: A very flexible material that has a lot of friction.

Desc_Rotor_C.name: Rotor
Desc_Rotor_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. As peças míveis de um motor.

Desc_Stator_C.name: Bobina
Desc_Stator_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. As peças estáticas de um motor.

Desc_Battery_C.name: Bateria
Desc_Battery_C.description: Principalmente utilizada como combustível para Drones e Veículos.

Desc_Motor_C.name: Motor
Desc_Motor_C.description: Creates a mechanical force that is used to move things from machines to vehicles.

Desc_AluminumPlateReinforced_C.name: Dissipador de Calor
Desc_AluminumPlateReinforced_C.description: Utilizado para dissipar o calor mais depressa.

Desc_CoolingSystem_C.name: Sistema de Refrigeração
Desc_CoolingSystem_C.description: Keeps advanced parts and buildings from exceeding efficient temperature levels.

Desc_MotorLightweight_C.name: Motor Turbo
Desc_MotorLightweight_C.description: A more complex and powerful version of the regular Motor.

Desc_Wire_C.name: Arame
Desc_Wire_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. Uma das peças mais básicas.

Desc_Cable_C.name: Cabo
Desc_Cable_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. Utilizado principalmente para construir cabos elétricos.

Desc_HighSpeedWire_C.name: Fio Rápido
Desc_HighSpeedWire_C.description: Caterium's high conductivity and resistance to corrosion make it ideal for small, advanced electronics.

Desc_CircuitBoard_C.name: Placa de Circuitos Impressos
Desc_CircuitBoard_C.description: Advanced electronics that have a plethora of different uses.

schemas.name: Alternativa: Placa de Circuito de Caterium
Alternativa: Placa de Circuito de Elétrodos
Alternativa: Placa de Circuitos de Silicone

Desc_CircuitBoardHighSpeed_C.name: Limitador de IA
Desc_CircuitBoardHighSpeed_C.description: Controls AIs and keeps them from evolving in malicious ways. Super advanced electronics.

Desc_HighSpeedConnector_C.name: Conector de Alta Velocidade
Desc_HighSpeedConnector_C.description: Connects multiple cables and wires in a very efficient way. Uses a standard pattern, so it has many varied applications.

schemas.name: Alternativa: Conector de Alta Velocidade de Silicone

Desc_SAMIngot_C.name: EMA Reanimado
Desc_SAMIngot_C.description: The active and contained form of the Strange Alien Matter. Proper electromagnetic containment is required, as it appears to be able to manipulate the atomic bonds of any matter it comes into contact with.

Desc_SAMFluctuator_C.name: Flutuador EMA
Desc_SAMFluctuator_C.description: The SAM Fluctuator is able to regulate and direct the behavior of Reanimated SAM through the application of electric charges with varying frequencies. This control facilitates technologies such as matter-to-energy conversion and spatiotemporal matter manipulation.

Desc_Computer_C.name: Computador
Desc_Computer_C.description: A complex logic machine that is used to control advanced behavior in other machines.

Desc_ComputerSuper_C.name: Supercomputador
Desc_ComputerSuper_C.description: The next-gen version of a Computer.

Desc_ModularFrameLightweight_C.name: Unidade de Controlo por Rádio
Desc_ModularFrameLightweight_C.description: Melhora e direciona sinais de rádio.

schemas.name: Alternativa: Sistema de Controlo por Rádio
Alternativa: Unidade de Conexão de Rádio

Desc_CrystalOscillator_C.name: Oscilador Cristalino
Desc_CrystalOscillator_C.description: An electronic oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create an electrical signal with a precise frequency.

Desc_QuantumOscillator_C.name: Oscilador de Sobreposição
Desc_QuantumOscillator_C.description: An oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create a string vibration with a precise frequency. Often used in teleportation technology and dimensional manipulation.

Desc_Diamond_C.name: Diamonds
Desc_Diamond_C.description: Synthetic Diamonds produced by exposing Coal to extreme heat and pressure. Used in the production of Time Crystals and Dark Matter Crystals. Consumo de Energia: 250-750 MW (Média de 500 MW).

Desc_TimeCrystal_C.name: Time Crystal
Desc_TimeCrystal_C.description: Time Crystals are Diamonds that have been reconfigured on a sub-atomic level in the Converter to retain a time-periodic self-organizing structure. This allows them to be used in the development of quantum processing and storage technologies.

Desc_DarkMatter_C.name: Dark Matter Crystal
Desc_DarkMatter_C.description: Concentrated Dark Matter Residue that is isolated within a crystalline vessel. This form of containment allows for utilising Dark Matter reliably in other production processes. Consumo de Energia: 500-1500 MW (Média de 1000 MW).

Desc_SingularityCell_C.name: Singularity Cell
Desc_SingularityCell_C.description: Used to break down space and time. Required to power Portals.

Desc_TemporalProcessor_C.name: Neural-Quantum Processor
Desc_TemporalProcessor_C.description: The Neural-Quantum Processor utilizes a combination of neural network architecture and quantum computing techniques to achieve unprecedented performance. This technology has enabled some of FICSIT's biggest advancements in artificial intelligence and relativistic engineering.

Desc_AlienPowerFuel_C.name: Alien Power Matrix
Desc_AlienPowerFuel_C.description: This intricate condensed-matter matrix is used to enhance the output of the Alien Power Augmenter. Initially developed in efforts to create a human-made Somersloop, the Alien Power Matrix cannot sustain the extra-dimensional energy connection on its own. However, it can effectively stabilize the energy stream of the Somersloop.

Desc_FluidCanister_C.name: Recipiente Vazio
Desc_FluidCanister_C.description: Utilizado para embalar fluidos para transporte.

Desc_GasTank_C.name: Tanque de Fluido Vazio
Desc_GasTank_C.description: Utilizado para embalar gases e líquidos voláteis para transporte.

Desc_PressureConversionCube_C.name: Cubo Conversor de Pressões
Desc_PressureConversionCube_C.description: Converte força vinda do exterior em pressão interna. Necessário para conter matéria instável altamente-energética.

Desc_PackagedAlumina_C.name: Solução de Alumina Empacotada
Desc_PackagedAlumina_C.description: Solução de alumina, embalada para transporte alternativo.

Desc_PackagedSulfuricAcid_C.name: Ácido Sulfúrico Embalado
Desc_PackagedSulfuricAcid_C.description: Ácido Sulfúrico, embalado para transporte alternativo.

Desc_PackagedNitricAcid_C.name: Ácido Nítrico Embalado
Desc_PackagedNitricAcid_C.description: Ácido Nítrico, embalado para transporte alternativo.

Desc_PackagedNitrogenGas_C.name: Gás Nitrogénio Embalado
Desc_PackagedNitrogenGas_C.description: Gás Nitrogénio, embalado para transporte alternativo.

Desc_Leaves_C.name: Folhas
Desc_Leaves_C.description: Principalmente utilizado como combustível. Biomass Burners and vehicles can use Leaves for power.

Desc_Mycelia_C.name: Micélio
Desc_Mycelia_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. Biomass Burners and vehicles can also use Mycelia for power.

Desc_FlowerPetals_C.name: Pétalas de Flores
Desc_FlowerPetals_C.description: Utilizado para fabrico. Pétalas de flores nativas coloridas.

Desc_Wood_C.name: Madeira
Desc_Wood_C.description: Principalmente utilizado como combustível. Biomass Burners and vehicles can use Wood for power.

Desc_CompactedCoal_C.name: Carvão Compactado
Desc_CompactedCoal_C.description: A much more efficient alternative to Coal. Used as fuel for vehicles and Coal-Powered Generators.

Desc_PackagedOil_C.name: Petróleo Embalado
Desc_PackagedOil_C.description: Petróleo Bruto, embalado para transporte alternativo. Pode ser utilizado como combustível para Veículos.

Desc_PackagedOilResidue_C.name: Resíduo de Petróleo Pesado Embalado
Desc_PackagedOilResidue_C.description: Resíduo Pesado de Petróleo, embalado para transporte alternativo. Pode ser utilizado como combustível para veículos.

Desc_Biofuel_C.name: Biocombustível Sólido
Desc_Biofuel_C.description: A forma de biomassa sólida mais eficiente do ponto de vista energético. Pode ser utilizada como combustível para a Serra Elétrica.

Desc_Fuel_C.name: Combustível Embalado
Desc_Fuel_C.description: Combustível, embalado para transporte alternativo. Pode ser utilizado como combustível para Veículos e para o Jetpack.

Desc_PackagedBiofuel_C.name: Biocombustível Líquido Embalado
Desc_PackagedBiofuel_C.description: Biocombustível Líquido, embalado para transporte alternativo. Pode ser utilizado como combustível para Veículos e para a Jetpack.

Desc_TurboFuel_C.name: Turbo-Combustível Embalado
Desc_TurboFuel_C.description: Turbo-combustível, embalado para transporte alternativo. Pode ser utilizado como combustível para Veículos e para a Jetpack.

Desc_PackagedRocketFuel_C.name: Combustível de Foguete Embalado
Desc_PackagedRocketFuel_C.description: Rocket Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

Desc_PackagedIonizedFuel_C.name: Packaged Ionized Fuel
Desc_PackagedIonizedFuel_C.description: Ionized Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

Desc_NuclearFuelRod_C.name: Vara de Combustível de Urânio
Desc_NuclearFuelRod_C.description: Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants. Cuidado: Produz Resíduos de Urânio radioativos quando consumida. Cuidado: Moderadamente Radioativa.

schemas.name: Alternativa: Unidade de Combustível de Urânio

Desc_PlutoniumFuelRod_C.name: Vara de Combustível de Plutónio
Desc_PlutoniumFuelRod_C.description: Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants. Cuidado: Produz Resíduos de Plutónio radioativos quando consumida. Cuidado: ALTAMENTE Radioativo.

schemas.name: Alternativa: Unidade de Combustível de Plutónio

Desc_Gunpowder_C.name: Pólvora Preta
Desc_Gunpowder_C.description: Um pó explosivo que é normalmente usado para produzir explosivos simples.

Desc_GunpowderMK2_C.name: Pó sem Fumo
Desc_GunpowderMK2_C.description: Um pó explosivo que é normalmente usado para produzir armas de fogo modernas.

Desc_Filter_C.name: Filtro de Gás
Desc_Filter_C.description: Filters out toxins and pollutants from the air when used with a Gas Mask.

Desc_ColorCartridge_C.name: Cartucho de Cor
Desc_ColorCartridge_C.description: Utilizado para aplicar Padrões a estruturas com o Personalizador. (Os padrões podem ser comprados na Loja AWESOME)

BP_EquipmentDescriptorBeacon_C.name: Sinalizador
BP_EquipmentDescriptorBeacon_C.description: REMOÇÃO PENDENTE Este item vai (provavelmente) ser removido numa futura atualização. Atualmente apenas é usado como ingrediente em uma receita alternativa.

Desc_HazmatFilter_C.name: Iodine-Infused Filter
Desc_HazmatFilter_C.description: Absorbs radioactive particles when used with the Hazmat Suit.

Desc_SpikedRebar_C.name: Vergalhão de Ferro
Desc_SpikedRebar_C.description: Can be shot using the Rebar Gun for self-defense purposes.

Desc_Rebar_Stunshot_C.name: Vergalhão Atordoante
Desc_Rebar_Stunshot_C.description: Eletrocuta o alvo no impacto, atordoando-o por um curto período. Duração do atordoamento: 5 segundos

Desc_Rebar_Spreadshot_C.name: Vergalhão de Dispersão
Desc_Rebar_Spreadshot_C.description: Fractures when shot, launching deadly debris with wide spread but limited range.

Desc_Rebar_Explosive_C.name: Vergalhão Explosivo
Desc_Rebar_Explosive_C.description: Explode no impacto, dando muito dano.

Desc_CartridgeStandard_C.name: Munição de Carabina
Desc_CartridgeStandard_C.description: Munição de Carabina normal, útil para estabelecer dominância.

Desc_CartridgeSmartProjectile_C.name: Munição de Carabina Teleguiada
Desc_CartridgeSmartProjectile_C.description: O sistema de orientação de bala incorporado nesta munição permite atingir com precisão qualquer alvo na área do retículo. Especialmente útil ao lidar com ameaças ágeis ou para Pioneiros que não se dão ao trabalho de mirar corretamente.

Desc_CartridgeChaos_C.name: Munição de Carabina Turbo
Desc_CartridgeChaos_C.description: Lightweight, compact, and volatile. These rounds provide extreme capacity and rate of fire at the cost of accuracy.

Desc_NobeliskExplosive_C.name: Nobelisco
Desc_NobeliskExplosive_C.description: Um explosivo simples, útil para limpar rochedos, vegetação, e outros obstáculos.

Desc_NobeliskGas_C.name: Nobelisco de Gás
Desc_NobeliskGas_C.description: Creates a deadly gas cloud instead of a regular explosion.

Desc_NobeliskShockwave_C.name: Nobelisco Pulsante
Desc_NobeliskShockwave_C.description: Generates a powerful shockwave instead of a regular explosion.

Desc_NobeliskCluster_C.name: Nobelisco Dispersivo
Desc_NobeliskCluster_C.description: Detonates into multiple smaller explosions. Practical for clearing out large areas of vegetation and other inconveniences.

Desc_NobeliskNuke_C.name: Nobelisco Nuclear
Desc_NobeliskNuke_C.description: Uses a nuclear fission reaction to generate a massive explosion. ATENÇÃO: Certifica-te que toda a propriedade FICSIT está fora da zona de explosão antes da detonação.

Desc_UraniumCell_C.name: Célula de Urânio Encapsulada
Desc_UraniumCell_C.description: Used to produce Uranium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production. Made from Uranium Ore. Cuidado: Suavemente Radioativo.

Desc_NonFissibleUranium_C.name: Non-Fissile Uranium
Desc_NonFissibleUranium_C.description: The Uranium-238 isotope is non-fissile, meaning it cannot be used for nuclear fission. It can, however, be converted into fissile Plutonium in the Particle Accelerator. Cuidado: Suavemente Radioativo.

Desc_PlutoniumPellet_C.name: Pastilhas de Plutónio
Desc_PlutoniumPellet_C.description: Produzidas no Acelerador de partículas através da conversão de Urânio não-físsil. Usadas para produzir Células de Plutónio Encapsuladas para Varass de Combustível de Plutónio. Consumo de Energia: 250-750 MW (Média de 500 MW). Cuidado: Moderadamente Radioativa.

Desc_PlutoniumCell_C.name: Célula de Plutónio Encapsulada
Desc_PlutoniumCell_C.description: Plutonium Pellets encased in concrete. Usadas para produzir Varas de Combustível de Plutónio para produção de Energia Nuclear. Consumo de Energia: 250-750 MW (Média de 500 MW). Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

Desc_Ficsonium_C.name: Ficsonium
Desc_Ficsonium_C.description: Usage and production of this material is strictly prohibited. On Earth, that is. There are no rules in space, only efficiency. Consumo de Energia: 500-1500 MW (Média de 1000 MW). Cuidado: Moderadamente Radioativa.

Desc_FicsoniumFuelRod_C.name: Ficsonium Fuel Rod
Desc_FicsoniumFuelRod_C.description: Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants. The power source that put FICSIT on the map. Literally. The crater is still there. Cuidado: Moderadamente Radioativa.

Desc_NuclearWaste_C.name: Resíduos de Urânio
Desc_NuclearWaste_C.description: The by-product of consuming Uranium Fuel Rods in a Nuclear Power Plant. Urânio não físsil pode ser extraído. Manuseie com cuidado. Cuidado: ALTAMENTE Radioativo.

Desc_PlutoniumWaste_C.name: Resíduos de Plutónio
Desc_PlutoniumWaste_C.description: The by-product of consuming Plutonium Fuel Rods in a Nuclear Power Plant. Must be stored in a safe location. Handle with caution. Cuidado: EXTREMAMENTE Radioativo.

Desc_Crystal_C.name: Lesma Elétrica Azul
Desc_Crystal_C.description: A strange slug radiating an unknown weak power.

Desc_Crystal_mk2_C.name: Lesma Elétrica Amarela
Desc_Crystal_mk2_C.description: A strange slug radiating an unknown power.

Desc_Crystal_mk3_C.name: Lesma Elétrica Roxa
Desc_Crystal_mk3_C.description: A strange slug radiating a powerful unknown power.

Desc_CrystalShard_C.name: Cristal de Energia
Desc_CrystalShard_C.description: Power Slug mucus compressed into a solid crystal-like shard. Irradia uma energia estranha.

Desc_ResourceSinkCoupon_C.name: Cupão FICSIT
Desc_ResourceSinkCoupon_C.description: Um cupão especial do programa de bónus FICSIT, obtido através do AWESOME Sink. Pode ser trocado na AWESOME Shop por marcos e recompensas de bónus.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_1_C.name: Chapeamento Inteligente
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_1_C.description: Project Part #1. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_2_C.name: Estrutura Versátil

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_5_C.name: Unidade de Controlo Adaptativo

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_7_C.name: Sistema Diretor de Montagem
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_7_C.description: Project Part #6. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Este sistema computacional extremamente rápido e preciso é especificamente projetado para direcionar o Projeto Assembly: Fase de montagem.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_6_C.name: Gerador de Campos Magnéticos
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_6_C.description: Project Part #7. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. These modular generators use superconducting magnets and vast amounts of electricity to produce a powerful and easily expandable magnetic field.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_8_C.name: Foguete de Propulsão Térmica
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_8_C.description: Project Part #8. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Usa calor extremo para produzir o plasma de alta pressão necessário para colocar o Projeto Assembly em movimento.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_9_C.name: Massa Nuclear
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_9_C.description: Project Part #9. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Consumo de Energia: 500-1500 MW (Média de 1000 MW). Massa Nuclear é matéria degenerada extremamente densa, formada quando pressão extrema força protões e eletrões juntos em neutrões. É teorizada existir naturalmente no interior da crosta de estrelas de neutrões.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_10_C.name: Biochemical Sculptor
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_10_C.description: Project Part #10. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Years ahead of the competition, this top-of-the-line 3D printer is used for the production of synthetic biological resources.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_11_C.name: Ballistic Warp Drive
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_11_C.description: Project Part #11. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. A large amount of force is required for the Warp Drives to activate, so sticking them to rockets was the logical next step. Additionally, results improved immensely when the observers were further removed from the Warp Drives upon activation.

Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_12_C.name: AI Expansion Server
Desc_SpaceElevatorPart_12_C.description: Project Part #12. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Power Usage: 0-2000 MW (1000 MW average). Growth is the metric by which we measure success.
